name: XYZ Institute of Technology
office_contact: Visit Admin Block, Ground Floor or call 1800-YYY-YYYY

internal_exam.title: Internal Exam Policy
rules: Missed internal exams require a medical certificate within 5 working days.
Re-tests are conducted only at the end of the semester.
A maximum of 2 re-tests per semester are allowed per student.

attendance.title: Attendance Policy
rules: Minimum 80% attendance required to sit for semester exams (stricter than ABC).
Between 70-80% requires HOD approval and counseling.
Below 70% results in semester repetition.

scholarship.title: Scholarship Policy
rules: Merit scholarship available for students with CGPA above 8.5.
Sports scholarship available for state and national-level athletes.
Need-based aid available for families with income under 3 LPA.

fee.title: Fee Policy
rules: Tuition fee due before the 10th of each semester start month.
Late fee penalty: Rs.100 per day after the 10th.
Installment payment available — apply through Finance Office.

hostel.title: Hostel Policy
rules: Hostel curfew at 10:00 PM on weekdays, 11:00 PM on weekends.
Visitors allowed only in common areas, 4 PM to 7 PM.
Hostel fee includes meals and is paid quarterly.

grievance.title: Grievance Policy
rules: Submit grievances via the XYZ Connect mobile app.
Resolution guaranteed within 5 working days.
Escalate to Director's Office if unresolved.

mental_health.title: Mental Health Support
rules: XYZ Wellness Center available 24/7 in Block C.
Counselor: wellness@xyzinstitute.edu or call +91-9988776655.
Free peer support groups every Wednesday at 5 PM.
Crisis helpline: iCall - 9152987821 (24/7 free).
Vandrevala Foundation: 1860-2662-345 (24/7 free).

contacts.title: Important Contacts
rules: Admin Block (Main): 1800-YYY-YYYY
Director's Office: Block A, 1st Floor
Examination Cell: exam@xyzinstitute.edu
Hostel Warden: Block B (Boys), Block D (Girls)
Campus Security: Available 24/7 at Gate 1
